title: Robotics;Notes
subTitle: After the outcome of the GunBuild-1 start-up test, Subaru tries to convince Akiho to build a new robot from scratch; Kai unexpectedly makes the discovery of the century.

title: Friends With Benefits
subTitle: A recruiter from New York gets a man recruited at a company and soon, they become friends. However, things get confusing when sex is involved in their relationship.

title: Insidious: Chapter 2
subTitle: Josh Lambert and his family relocate to his mother's old house in the hopes of recovering from past trauma. However, they soon encounter strange and chilling paranormal events.

title: XXX: State of the Union
subTitle: Darius Stone, a former US Navy SEAL, is recruited as a new agent in the XXX program to stop a rogue military faction from overthrowing the US government.

title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
subTitle: A diligent scientist invents an innovative machine that drops food from the sky to help his fellow residents. Chaos ensues when the machine becomes uncontrollable.

title: The Retirement Plan
subTitle: When their involvement with the wrong people puts her and her family at risk, Ashley turns to her estranged father for help, who is living a retired life in the Cayman Islands.

title: The Emoji Movie
subTitle: Gene is a smartphone emoji who can show a wide range of emotions instead of just one. When he makes a mistake that threatens his life, he sets out to become normal like his fellow emojis.

title: The Water Horse
subTitle: Young Angus Mac Morrow discovers a mysterious egg that grows up to be the Loch Ness monster. As they form a strong relationship, the boy's family refuses to believe in the creature's existence.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
subTitle: Miles Morales begins his new life as Spider-Man after receiving a spider bite. However, things take a strange twist when he meets alternate versions of himself from other universes.

title: Venom: The Last Dance
subTitle: As Eddie and Venom are tirelessly pursued by forces from both of their worlds, they find themselves out of options and left with a shattering last resort.

title: Bullet Train
subTitle: Ladybug, a professional assassin, is assigned to retrieve a briefcase from a bullet train. Soon, he finds himself battling many other killers who board the same train but with a different objective.

title: Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines
subTitle: John Connor, a cybernetic warrior from the future, travels back in time to accomplish his mission of protecting a man and his future wife, Kate, from a robotic attack.

title: Never Back Down 2: The Beatdown
subTitle: Four fighters from different backgrounds come together to train under a former MMA star. Ultimately, they have to fight each other and also the traitor who hides among them.

title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
subTitle: Peter Parker, the beloved superhero Spider-Man, faces four destructive elemental monsters while on holiday in Europe. Soon, he receives help from Mysterio, a fellow hero with mysterious origins.

title: The God of High School
subTitle: Jin Mori, a top high school fighter, joins God of High School, a brutal tournament where fighters borrow godly power to win their wishes and secrets.

title: The God of High School
subTitle: Jin Mori, a top high school fighter, joins God of High School, a brutal tournament where fighters borrow godly power to win their wishes and secrets.

title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
subTitle: Teenager Tsubasa Shiki moves from Tokyo to the island of Hokkaido. There, he meets Minami Fuyuki, a girl unlike any he has met before.

title: Robotics;Notes
subTitle: Kaito and Frau team up to locate Kimijima Report No. 3, but it won't be any easier than last time; the final, unaired episode of GUNVARREL is leaked online.

title: Robotics;Notes
subTitle: Kaito and Frau team up to locate Kimijima Report No. 3, but it won't be any easier than last time; the final, unaired episode of GUNVARREL is leaked online.

title: Robotics;Notes
subTitle: Kaito and Frau team up to locate Kimijima Report No. 3, but it won't be any easier than last time; the final, unaired episode of GUNVARREL is leaked online.

title: XXX
subTitle: The US government recruits extreme sports athlete Xander Cage to infiltrate a Russian criminal ring, which is plotting the destruction of the world.

title: It Ends With Us
subTitle: A woman's relationship with a charismatic but violent neurosurgeon is thrown in shambles by the sudden arrival of her first love.

title: Father Stu
subTitle: Upon suffering in an accident, an aspiring actor receives a vision guiding him to change his lifestyle. However, when he sets off to pursue the priesthood, a rare disease brings him more challenges.

title: Kill 'Em All 2
subTitle: Partnered by the CIA, Phillip and Vanessa return to Europe, facing a vengeful Russian-French terrorist Vlad, who wants to settle the score for his dead brother.

title: The Ugly Truth
subTitle: Abby, a lovelorn TV producer, finds herself in the midst of tests when she strikes a deal with her chauvinistic colleague, Mike, who wants to prove to her the accuracy of his relationship theories.

title: The Walk
subTitle: Philippe Petit, a French street performer, dreams of performing daring stunts. He attempts to walk between the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center in New York on a tightrope.

title: Zombieland: Double Tap
subTitle: Columbus, Tallahassee, Wichita and Little Rock set out on a mission to protect the rest of humanity by fighting evolved zombies while also battling their own internal demons.

title: The Equalizer 2
subTitle: Robert McCall's close friend, Susan Plummer, is killed while investigating a murder-suicide. As a former marine and spy, he leverages his skills and resources to find the culprit and avenge her death.

title: Gran Turismo
subTitle: With the help of a mechanic having a tragic past, an avid player of racing video games attempts to become a professional car racer.

title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
subTitle: The Mitchells, a dysfunctional family, must fight a robot apocalypse amidst their much-awaited road trip to save humanity.
A spaceship crash lands on prehistoric Earth, leaving only two survivors. Soon, they must survive against the hostile terrain and vicious creatures.

title: Venom
subTitle: A group of friends find themselves running for their very lives from Ray Sawyer, a reanimated corpse possessed by 13 evil souls, who has vicious plans for them.

title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
subTitle: Mike and Marcus face their toughest case yet as their late captain's reputation hangs in the balance. Subsequently, they unravel a complex web of cartel connections in a high-stakes mission.

title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
subTitle: Teenager Tsubasa Shiki moves from Tokyo to the island of Hokkaido. There, he meets Minami Fuyuki, a girl unlike any he has met before.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Don't Breathe 2
subTitle: Norman, a visually challenged navy veteran, lives in quiet solace with his foster daughter, Phoenix. However, he is forced to tap into his darker instincts when Phoenix is abducted.

title: The Cable Guy
subTitle: Chip, a cable technician, sets his sights on befriending Steven, a new customer whom he takes a fancy to. But when Steven spurns their friendship, Chip immediately starts to wreak havoc in his life.

title: Salt
subTitle: CIA agent Evelyn Salt's life takes an ugly turn when she is accused of planning the assassination of the Russian president. However, she flees and sets out to prove her innocence.
Micky, a maths professor, enlists five gifted students to use their abilities to win millions at blackjack in Las Vegas. He exploits their talents for personal gain in the glamorous casino city.

title: Premium Rush
subTitle: Wilee is a bicycle messenger who rides a single-gear bike with no brakes. His routine delivery turns into a dangerous chase when his last package of the day is pursued by corrupt police officers.

title: The Karate Kid
subTitle: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

title: Godzilla
subTitle: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
subTitle: A single mother and her two children move into a farmhouse inherited from her estranged father. As they settle in, they discover their associations with Ghostbusters.

title: Hollow Man
subTitle: Sebastian Caine, a scientist, develops an invisibility serum. However, when he uses it on himself and is unable to reverse the effects, it results in horrifying consequences.

title: Drunken Master
subTitle: Wong, a mischievous young boy, learns a special form of martial arts from his alcoholic master in order to prevent an assassin from executing his goals.

title: Madame Web
subTitle: After a near-fatal accident, New York City paramedic Cassandra gains the ability to see into the future. Soon, her visions lead her to protect three young girls from a mysterious enemy.

title: Battle: Los Angeles
subTitle: Michael Nantz, a Marine staff sergeant, renders his services again, soon after his retirement. He and his platoon have to save the city of Los Angeles from alien invaders.

title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
subTitle: When Van Helsing's invention goes awry, Johnny turns into a monster and Dracula becomes human. Later, they embark on a journey to find a cure before their transformations become permanent.
